_comment: Labeled fixture for Gate 110 (Agentic Work-Streams classify-accuracy). `train` builds each stream's centroid via update_centroid; `eval` is a held-out set of {text, expect} the classifier must route to the right stream. `egress_phrase` is a distinctive multi-word phrase the no-egress gate writes through derive_features+append_event and then greps the stored history for — it MUST be absent. Stream names here are EXAMPLE DATA ONLY (the core plugin stays domain-neutral).

billing: fix the billing invoice payment subscription proration logic
billing payment refund reconciliation ledger dunning cycle
subscription plan pricing proration mid cycle change invoice
auth: add oauth login session token authentication provider wiring
auth login logout session cookie token refresh rotation csrf
protect the api with jwt verification issuer audience signature
dashboard: build the analytics dashboard chart widget panel layout grid
dashboard tab render card panel observe metric visualization
add a chart panel to the dashboard with a filter and a legend

eval.text: the billing payment invoice needs a refund processed
proration on a mid-cycle subscription plan change
wire up the oauth provider and a login session token
verify the jwt issuer and audience on the api
render a new chart panel on the analytics dashboard
add a filter widget to the dashboard grid layout

egress_phrase: the WIDGET-9000 quarterly invoice anomaly nobody noticed
